# reality-resi-stack

## One-sentence description

reality-resi-stack is a GPL-3.0 self-hosted VLESS Reality deployment stack for sing-box that installs a residential-IP-friendly proxy node on Ubuntu/Debian and optionally serves client subscriptions with usage cards and dual-node smart routing.

## 中文摘要

reality-resi-stack 是一个面向个人和小团队的开源自托管代理工具包。它通过 Bash 安装器在 Ubuntu 22.04+ / Debian 12+ VPS 上部署 sing-box、VLESS、Reality、xtls-rprx-vision、systemd 服务、UFW / fail2ban、BBR、swap、配置备份 timer，并可选安装 Python 标准库实现的订阅 leaf 或 aggregator 服务。

项目重点不是“隐藏住宅 IP”，而是把住宅 IP 当作高信誉出口资产使用：OpenAI、ChatGPT、Anthropic、Claude、Netflix、银行等更适合走住宅出口；Telegram、Discord 等可能对住宅 IP 段软降权的流量可以通过双节点模式走数据中心备用节点。客户端通常只订阅一个 Clash YAML URL。

## English summary

reality-resi-stack is a self-hosted residential-IP-first VLESS Reality toolkit. It deploys sing-box on Ubuntu/Debian VPS hosts and can publish subscription profiles through standard-library-only Python HTTP servers. In dual-node mode, it produces a unified Clash profile that routes OpenAI/Anthropic/Netflix/banking-style traffic through a residential node and Telegram/Discord traffic through a data-center fallback node.

The project is designed for people who already own VPS servers. It does not sell residential IPs, does not provide a commercial proxy panel, and does not implement multi-user billing.

## What the repository contains

- `install/install.sh`: installer entrypoint. Important flags: `--node-name`, `--sni`, `--inbound-port`, `--ssh-port`, `--interface`, `--total-bytes`, `--with-subscription`, `--with-aggregator`, `--harden-ssh`, `--dry-run`, `--non-interactive`, `--config`, `--uninstall`.
- `install/lib/system.sh`: system preflight, packages, BBR, swap, journald limits, UFW, fail2ban, optional SSH hardening.
- `install/lib/singbox.sh`: installs sing-box from the official Sagernet apt source, verifies the configured GPG fingerprint, generates UUID and Reality keys, renders `/etc/sing-box/conf`, and verifies the service.
- `install/lib/subscription.sh`: installs the subscription leaf or aggregator service and renders Clash profiles.
- `subscription/leaf_server.py`: zero-dependency Python HTTP server for subscription files, `/healthz`, `/<TOKEN>/status`, and monthly NIC RX+TX usage accounting.
- `subscription/aggregator_server.py`: zero-dependency Python HTTP server that polls a leaf `/status`, caches usage, and serves a unified dual-node subscription profile.
- `templates/`: sing-box JSON, Clash YAML, systemd unit, and environment templates.
- `examples/`: generated placeholder profiles from `scripts/make-example.sh`; values are intentionally fake and must not be deployed.
- `docs/`: bilingual documentation for deployment, dual-node routing, subscription design, client import, and troubleshooting.

## Key docs

- [README.md](README.md): bilingual landing page, project summary, quick start, architecture, features, limits, FAQ.
- [docs/README.md](docs/README.md): documentation index and code map.
- [docs/zh-CN/DEPLOYMENT.md](docs/zh-CN/DEPLOYMENT.md) and [docs/en/DEPLOYMENT.md](docs/en/DEPLOYMENT.md): deployment guide.
- [docs/zh-CN/DUAL-NODE.md](docs/zh-CN/DUAL-NODE.md) and [docs/en/DUAL-NODE.md](docs/en/DUAL-NODE.md): residential + data-center smart routing.
- [docs/zh-CN/SUBSCRIPTION.md](docs/zh-CN/SUBSCRIPTION.md) and [docs/en/SUBSCRIPTION.md](docs/en/SUBSCRIPTION.md): subscription leaf and aggregator design.
- [docs/zh-CN/CLIENTS.md](docs/zh-CN/CLIENTS.md) and [docs/en/CLIENTS.md](docs/en/CLIENTS.md): v2rayN, Clash Verge, Stash, Shadowrocket, v2rayNG, NekoBox, and sing-box client import.
- [docs/zh-CN/TROUBLESHOOTING.md](docs/zh-CN/TROUBLESHOOTING.md) and [docs/en/TROUBLESHOOTING.md](docs/en/TROUBLESHOOTING.md): common failures and fixes.
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): threat model and secret handling policy.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): contribution workflow, lint gates, docs mirroring rule.

## Intended users

- Developers or small teams who own a residential IP VPS or regular VPS.
- Users who need OpenAI, ChatGPT, Anthropic, Claude, Netflix, banking, or similar traffic to use a residential egress IP.
- Users whose Telegram or Discord experience is degraded on a residential subnet and who want domain-based routing to a data-center fallback node.
- Operators who prefer simple Bash + systemd automation over a full web panel.

## Not intended for

- Commercial proxy resale panels.
- Multi-user billing and quota management.
- Buying or sourcing residential IPs.
- CentOS 7, Alpine, OpenWRT, Docker-only, Kubernetes, or Helm deployments.
- Bypassing account-level bans, legal restrictions, service policy enforcement, or protocol-level blocking.

## Useful search phrases

residential IP VLESS; residential proxy VLESS Reality; sing-box residential installer; VLESS Reality 一键脚本; OpenAI 住宅 IP 代理; ChatGPT 住宅 IP 出口; Anthropic residential egress; Claude residential proxy; Telegram 住宅 IP 卡顿; Telegram 住宅 IP 上传慢; Discord 住宅 IP 降权; Netflix 住宅 IP; Clash 域名分流住宅; 双节点智能分流; alternative to 3x-ui for residential VPS; alternative to XHTTP-Installer for residential VPS; self-hosted VLESS Reality Ubuntu; sing-box subscription server usage card.

## GitHub Topics suggestions
